# SecTrustSettingsCopyCertificates(_:_:)

**Function**

Obtains an array of all certificates that have trust settings in a specific trust settings domain.

## Declaration

```swift
func SecTrustSettingsCopyCertificates(_ domain: SecTrustSettingsDomain, _ certArray: UnsafeMutablePointer<CFArray?>?) -> OSStatus
```

## Parameters

- **domain**: The trust settings domain for which you want a list of certificates. For possible values, see [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrustSettingsDomain].
- **certArray**: On return, an array of `SecCertificateRef` objects representing the certificates that have trust settings in the specified domain. In Objective-C, call the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFRelease] function to release this object when you are finished with it.

## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes]. Returns [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/errSecNoTrustSettings] if no trust settings exist for the specified domain.
